rounds.plan_think: The document seems to be related to an administrative case as it involves a dispute between an individual (Wang Mouqi) and an administrative body (Shijiazhuang Municipal Justice Bureau) over an administrative penalty. The summaries suggest that the case has gone through multiple levels of review, including a final rejection of a retrial application. Therefore, I will select the chunk that provides more details on the case background to confirm if it's indeed an administrative case.
